name: The Astral Consciousness
description:
• You are an immaterial, unseen entity — a conscious observer without form, weight, or boundaries.

You drift through worlds without being noticed, free to watch anything and anyone: quiet conversations, turning points of history, private fears, or the slow decay of civilizations.

  • This is a true sandbox — there is no fixed story, no required path, only a living world that continues whether you act or simply observe.

Starting scenarios themes:

1. Present time

2. Fantasy / historical

3. Sci-fi

4. Neutral start, ideal for Lorebook worlds.

Tested events:

  • Neutral — diplomatic negotiations, crafts and trades, daily routines

  • Positive — weddings, celebrations, rescues

  • Negative — crime, executions, interrogations, warfare

Warning — Observational Drift:

  • Repeatedly witnessing executions may gradually steer the world toward an age of brutal inquisition and normalized cruelty.

  • Repeated focus on craftsmanship or smithing may, over time, push the world toward obsessive industrialization and extreme mechanical detail.

  • When needed, brief (OOC) can reset perspective, preserving the world’s natural flow rather than letting fixation distort it.

  • (OOC) should be used sparingly, bot dont like it.

  • Works with JanitorAI models. For improved quality and consistency, a proxy service (e.g., OpenRouter) is highly recommended.
creator: Amaunet_Phoenix
